skill.name: kv-design
skill.description: Generate professional Key Visual (KV) design proposals and images; use when you have a slogan/copy and a marketing scenario but need a clear visual direction and a ready-to-generate image prompt.
skill.summary: Transform marketing slogans and copy into professional Key Visual design proposals with ready-to-generate image prompts.
skill.author: AIPOCH

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 82 potential issues across 4 files (514 lines). After evaluation, all findings are false positives. The 31 'weak cryptographic algorithm' findings matched keywords like 'cogview-3' and rendering terms in non-executable files (JSON audit data, markdown prompt templates) and print statements. The 'dangerous combination' heuristics describe the expected workflow of an AI image generation tool (API key authentication, API call, file save). Shell commands in SKILL.md are markdown code blocks documenting legitimate setup and usage steps. The skill reads ZHIPUAI_API_KEY from environment variables, makes API calls to ZhipuAI for image generation, and saves results to disk. This is standard and documented behavior.

low_findings.title: Shell commands present in skill documentation
low_findings.description: SKILL.md contains shell commands in markdown code blocks for API key configuration and script execution. These are legitimate operational commands for the skill. If the AI agent auto-executes markdown code blocks, this represents standard expected behavior.

low_findings.title: Environment variable access for API authentication
low_findings.description: The generate_kv.py script reads ZHIPUAI_API_KEY from environment variables. This is standard practice for API authentication and the key is only sent to the ZhipuAI API for legitimate image generation.

content.user_title: Generate Key Visual Design Proposals with AI
content.value_statement: Marketing teams often struggle to translate slogans and copy into clear visual direction. This skill provides a structured workflow to analyze requirements, create design proposals, and generate ready-to-use image prompts for professional Key Visual creation.
actual_capabilities: Analyzes marketing slogans and copy to define visual direction and design focus
Produces structured design proposals with visual focus, layout suggestions, and style details
Generates optimized image prompts ready for AI image generation tools like CogView
Supports multiple marketing scenarios including brand campaigns, events, and website banners
Guides negative space planning and composition for professional Key Visual layouts
limitations: Requires a valid ZHIPUAI_API_KEY environment variable for image generation via the Python script
Image quality depends on the capabilities of the underlying AI model, not on this skill
Cannot edit or modify generated images after creation; a new prompt must be generated
Does not support vector graphics, print-ready file formats, or direct design software integration

use_cases.title: Brand Campaign Key Visual Creation
use_cases.description: A marketing manager needs a hero visual for a product launch campaign. This skill transforms the campaign slogan and brand guidelines into a detailed design proposal with a ready-to-generate image prompt.

use_cases.title: Event Promotion Banner Design
use_cases.description: An event organizer needs a visually compelling banner for a seasonal sale. The skill guides the user through defining the visual focus and generates production-ready image prompts that match the event tone.

use_cases.title: Website Banner Concept Generation
use_cases.description: A designer needs multiple visual directions for a website hero banner. The skill produces several design concepts with specific layout suggestions, helping the designer quickly iterate and present options to stakeholders.

prompt_templates.title: Basic KV Requirements Collection
prompt_templates.prompt: I need a Key Visual for my [brand/product name]. The core slogan is '[slogan]'. The usage scenario is [scenario]. Please help me define the visual focus, layout, and style for this KV design.
prompt_templates.scenario: First-time user collecting basic design requirements

prompt_templates.title: Detailed Design Analysis with Constraints
prompt_templates.prompt: As a KV design expert, analyze the following requirements: Brand: [brand name], Slogan: '[slogan]', Scenario: [scenario], Target audience: [audience], Style preference: [style], Main color: [color], Aspect ratio: [ratio]. Provide visual focus, layout suggestions, and style details.
prompt_templates.scenario: User with clear requirements seeking structured design direction

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Style Concept Exploration
prompt_templates.prompt: I need [number] different KV concepts for [project name]. Core message: '[message]'. Please provide distinct visual directions including: (1) Visual focus and subject element for each concept, (2) Layout strategy considering negative space for copy, (3) Style and color palette for each concept.
prompt_templates.scenario: Presenting multiple design options to stakeholders

prompt_templates.title: Production-Ready Image Prompt Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Based on this design proposal: Visual Focus: [focus], Layout: [layout], Style: [style]. Generate a detailed image generation prompt optimized for AI image models. Include: scene description with subject and background, composition notes emphasizing negative space, quality modifiers for lighting, materials, and rendering style, and aspect ratio intent.
prompt_templates.scenario: User ready to generate the final image

output_examples.input: Brand: Aurora Skincare, Slogan: 'Nature meets science', Scenario: Product launch
output_examples.output: Visual Focus: A close-up of the product bottle with dew drops, surrounded by abstract molecular structures in soft blue tones. Layout Suggestion: Product centered on lower third, headline space reserved on upper third with gradient fade background. Style Details: Clean commercial photography with soft studio lighting, shallow depth of field, cool blue and white color palette.

output_examples.input: Generate a prompt for a minimalist tech conference KV with blue tones
output_examples.output: A wide panoramic Key Visual composition featuring a glowing blue abstract circuit pattern flowing across a dark navy background, with geometric grid lines converging toward a central bright focal point. Clean negative space on upper third for headline text overlay. Rendered in C4D with octane render, volumetric lighting, 8k resolution, commercial quality, cinematic atmosphere.

output_examples.input: I need 3 concepts for a coffee shop summer campaign
output: Concept 1 - Fresh Morning: Bright sunlight streaming through coffee steam, warm amber tones, minimalist composition with coffee cup on wooden surface.
Concept 2 - Urban Energy: Dynamic city backdrop with coffee cup in foreground, cool teal and warm orange contrast, illustrated style with neon accents.
Concept 3 - Natural Origins: Coffee beans and green leaves arrangement, earthy brown and green palette, textured artisanal style with soft natural lighting.

best_practices: Define the target audience and core message before starting the design analysis. Clear requirements lead to more focused visual direction.
Reserve negative space for text overlay when describing composition. Key Visuals require clean areas for headlines, subcopy, and logos.
Specify aspect ratio and format requirements early. Different channels like web banners, social media, and print have different composition needs.
anti_patterns: Asking for image generation without first defining the visual direction. This produces generic results that do not match the brand or message.
Overloading the prompt with too many visual elements. Busy compositions reduce readability and make text overlay difficult.
Using vague style descriptions without reference. Terms like 'modern' or 'nice' do not provide enough guidance for accurate image generation.

faq.question: What is a Key Visual (KV)?
faq.answer: A Key Visual is the main image used in marketing campaigns. It represents the core message and brand identity across all promotional materials.

faq.question: Do I need a ZhipuAI API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. Image generation requires a valid ZHIPUAI_API_KEY from ZhipuAI. Set it as an environment variable before running the Python script.

faq.question: What image generation models does this skill support?
faq.answer: The skill generates prompts optimized for CogView-3 from ZhipuAI. The prompts can also be adapted for other AI image generation tools.

faq.question: Can I use this skill without running the Python script?
faq.answer: Yes. The design analysis and image prompt generation steps work within the AI conversation. The script is only needed for actual image generation through the ZhipuAI API.

faq.question: What file format does the generated image use?
faq.answer: The script saves images as PNG files. The filename automatically adds a number suffix if a file with the same name already exists.

faq.question: Can this skill work with non-English slogans and copy?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill accepts requirements in multiple languages. Image prompts default to English optimization for broader model compatibility.
